category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Turkey) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Turkey Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入土耳其：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入土耳其：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Turkey requirements: CE marking under the EU–Turkey Customs Union, TS EN IEC 62133-2 cell safety (TSE adoption), EMC/CE marking, UN 38.3 / ADR transport, a Turkish importer/authorised representative, and Ministry of Trade market surveillance.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与土耳其要求对照：欧盟—土耳其关税同盟下的CE标志、TS EN IEC 62133-2电芯安全（TSE采标）、EMC/CE标志、UN 38.3/ADR运输、土耳其进口商/授权代表，以及贸易部市场监督。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與土耳其要求對照：歐盟—土耳其關稅同盟下的CE標誌、TS EN IEC 62133-2電芯安全（TSE採標）、EMC/CE標誌、UN 38.3/ADR運輸、土耳其進口商/授權代表，以及貿易部市場監督。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters must obtain TS EN IEC 62133-2 testing, CE marking under the EU–Turkey Customs Union (LVD/EMC/RED-aligned Turkish technical regulations), and appoint a Turkey-established importer or authorised representative responsible for market surveillance — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商须取得TS EN IEC 62133-2检测报告、依据欧盟—土耳其关税同盟（与LVD/EMC/RED对齐的土耳其技术法规）的CE标志，并指定一名在土耳其设立、负责市场监督的进口商或授权代表——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商須取得TS EN IEC 62133-2檢測報告、依據歐盟—土耳其關稅同盟（與LVD/EMC/RED對齊的土耳其技術法規）的CE標誌，並指定一名在土耳其設立、負責市場監督的進口商或授權代表——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from ticaret.gov.tr, mevzuat.gov.tr, tse.org.tr, resmigazete.gov.tr, iec.ch, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does China's GB 31241 meet Turkey's requirements for lithium battery safety?
q.zh: 中国GB 31241是否满足土耳其锂电池安全要求？
q.zht: 中國GB 31241是否滿足土耳其鋰電池安全要求？

a.en: No. Because Turkey is in a Customs Union with the EU, it requires CE marking under Turkish technical regulations that transpose the EU Low Voltage and EMC directives. Portable lithium cells and packs are expected to conform to TS EN IEC 62133-2 (the Turkish Standards Institution / TSE adoption of EN IEC 62133-2). A GB 31241 test report alone is not sufficient for Turkish market access, and a Turkey-established importer or authorised representative must be appointed.
a.zh: 不。由于土耳其与欧盟处于关税同盟，须依据转化欧盟低压指令和EMC指令的土耳其技术法规取得CE标志。便携式锂电芯和电池组应符合TS EN IEC 62133-2（土耳其标准协会/TSE对EN IEC 62133-2的采标）。仅凭GB 31241测试报告不足以进入土耳其市场，还须指定在土耳其设立的进口商或授权代表。
a.zht: 不。由於土耳其與歐盟處於關稅同盟，須依據轉化歐盟低壓指令和EMC指令的土耳其技術法規取得CE標誌。便攜式鋰電芯和電池組應符合TS EN IEC 62133-2（土耳其標準協會/TSE對EN IEC 62133-2的採標）。僅憑GB 31241測試報告不足以進入土耳其市場，還須指定在土耳其設立的進口商或授權代表。

q.en: What legal basis lets CE-marked batteries enter Turkey, and what is added on top?
q.zh: 什么法律基础允许CE标志电池进入土耳其，又额外增加了哪些要求？
q.zht: 什麼法律基礎允許CE標誌電池進入土耳其，又額外增加了哪些要求？

a.en: The EU–Turkey Customs Union (Decision 1/95) and Turkey's framework law on the preparation and implementation of technical legislation on products (Law No. 7223) require products to bear CE marking and conform to Turkish technical regulations harmonised with EU directives. On top of CE conformity, exporters need a Turkey-established importer or authorised representative, must satisfy Ministry of Trade (Ticaret Bakanlığı) market surveillance, may face TSE conformity-mark and TS EN testing expectations, and must clear customs at ports such as Mersin or Istanbul-Ambarlı. Turkey is also progressively aligning its battery/waste-battery rules with EU Regulation 2023/1542.
a.zh: 欧盟—土耳其关税同盟（1/95号决定）及土耳其《产品技术立法的编制与实施框架法》（第7223号法）要求产品加贴CE标志并符合与欧盟指令协调的土耳其技术法规。在CE符合性之上，出口商还须有在土耳其设立的进口商或授权代表，须满足贸易部（Ticaret Bakanlığı）市场监督，可能面临TSE合格标志及TS EN测试要求，并须在梅尔辛（Mersin）或伊斯坦布尔—安巴尔勒（Ambarlı）等港口完成清关。土耳其也在逐步将其电池/废电池规则与欧盟法规2023/1542对齐。
a.zht: 歐盟—土耳其關稅同盟（1/95號決定）及土耳其《產品技術立法的編製與實施框架法》（第7223號法）要求產品加貼CE標誌並符合與歐盟指令協調的土耳其技術法規。在CE符合性之上，出口商還須有在土耳其設立的進口商或授權代表，須滿足貿易部（Ticaret Bakanlığı）市場監督，可能面臨TSE合格標誌及TS EN測試要求，並須在梅爾辛（Mersin）或伊斯坦堡—安巴爾勒（Ambarlı）等港口完成清關。土耳其也在逐步將其電池/廢電池規則與歐盟法規2023/1542對齊。
